name: Parmesan Bread Sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Prepare baking sheets with cooking spray; set aside.
3. Pour egg whites into a 9 x 13-inch pan.
4. In another 9 x 13-inch pan, sprinkle with parmesan cheese and garlic powder.
5. Divide dough into 16 pieces and shape each piece into a ball.
6. On lightly floured surface, roll each ball into a rope, 12 inches long.
7. Dip rope in egg whites, then into the parmesan cheese mixture, coating evenly.
8. Gently twist each rope several times to create a spiraled look.
9. Lay bread sticks on prepared baking sheets, 2 inches apart.
10. Bake for 12 minutes, or until crisp and golden brown.
